name: Curried Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups cooked chicken breast halves, cubed
recipeInstructions:
For the dressing:
1 cup plain nonfat yogurt
1 tablespoon nonfat mayonnaise
3 teaspoons curry powder
3 tablespoons freshly squeezed lemon juice
freshly ground black pepper to taste
1 tablespoon Dijon mustard
2 tablespoons minced shallot (1 small)
Combine the chicken, peas, carrot, celery seed, raisins, shredded cabbage, apple, scallions, and celery in a salad bowl.
Whisk together all the dressing ingredients in a small bowl.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss well to combine.
Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
Place a cabbage leaf on each salad plate, curved side down. Mound the salad onto the leaves and garnish with cherry tomatoes and parsley.
